original_image_tags: A small, off-white card with a color illustration of a goldfinch bird perched on a pine branch. The card has handwritten text in blue ink and is taped onto a larger, beige folder page with clear tape. The page itself has some stains and hole punches at the top.

elements.description: Hand-drawn color illustration of a single yellow bird perched on a brown branch with green pine needles.
FBI receipt stamp containing the text 'RECORDED - 51 162-83894-147', 'FBI', and the date '23 OCT 22 1948'.

judge.reason: Description A describes a photograph of a goldfinch on a pine branch on a card, while Description B describes a sketch of a yellow bird on a branch, and B adds two distinct stamps not mentioned by A, indicating completely different visual content.
